entry.title: Re: SAP CPI call oData v2 service defined in SAP CAP project
entry.content:
An integration flow can send any payload to the HTTP adapter: XML, Json, Text, ... so the iflow you have will work in the same way as your local mock test.

The only thing you mention which is 'not working' in your example is the PARENT_DETAILS. This is because your entity relationship is modeled as an association instead of composition, in which case deep inserts only work with pre-existing entities, see: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services#deep-reads-writes

entry.title: Re: Check the Availability of Your Multi-Environment HANA Cloud Instances with SAP Automation Pilot
entry.content: Hi, @js2! In SAP Automation Pilot, you can schedule executions to be triggered on regular intervals (monthly, weekly, daily, hourly, etc). So how often you should run it depends on your setup and your needs. Find more info about scheduled executions here 🙂

entry.title: Unable to use Greek alphabet letters when entering Greek National ID information,
entry.content:
Not able to update Greece alphabets in Greece National ID Portlet.  Kindly help me if any has configured this. 

Thanks in advance..

entry.title: Re: Embracing Sustainability with SAP Ariba
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: HI, My name is Ahmed and I believe this digital skills initiative is a great way to pay my career forward and help those take the first step in transforming their lives. I think this opportunity would be an amazing way to start me on a new career as an SAP consultant. I loved your analogy about the amusement park experience and I certainly identify as one of those people who would love to learn more about the bigger picture about how businesses operate, improve their processes and provide quality products  and/or services to their customers.

entry.title: Re: Check the Availability of Your Multi-Environment HANA Cloud Instances with SAP Automation Pilot
entry.content: Thankyou @alisa_dermen . I have seen the schedule capability. I guess I was more wondering on the frequency. What would be too much? You want to see issues before your users hopefully...

entry.title: Re: Checking Retry Count at Runtime in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I am aware of the pipeline concept and its retry handling capabilities. However, introducing an additional generic step seems unnecessary in my case since Kafka already manages retries. My goal is to directly access the retry count at runtime without adding extra steps. If there's a way to achieve this with Kafka or any direct method, it would be greatly appreciated. I have enabled trace, as you noticed from my screenshot, but I haven't been able to identify the retry count from it.

entry.title: FLTP to CHAR
entry.content: Is it possible to convert FLT ( 16,16) to CHAR(4)  in ABAP?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right.
entry.content:
Hi Steven,
yes, custom code analysis in Readiness Check is for customers having their own ABAP developments.
However, this is not a topic for simplification item check handled in this blog.
Please refer to the following Readiness Check community for more information:
https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/readiness-check

For SAP S/4HANA upgrades I recommend also this blog:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/enhanced-custom-code-analysis-in-sap-readiness-check-for-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13580469 

Regards,
Stefan Berndt

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Absolutely lovely. I like the use of spread on a string, instead of, say, split(''). Did you see the jq function explode which does effectively both splitting and converting to codes? https://jqlang.github.io/jq/manual/#explode 

And to your classic use of reduce with (a, x) => a + x, the jq's add function (in my screenshot) is actually just syntactic sugar for that - see https://github.com/jqlang/jq/blob/1f1e619f4e1478598aca56115948eb14d484b9fe/src/builtin.jq#L11:

def add: reduce .[] as $x (null; . + $x);

entry.title: Re: 工艺路线通过API创建的时候工作中心无法传入
entry.content:
你好，

从2408版本开始，通过API创建、新增工序请参照Help链接的示例 ：

Create Production Routing Operation (Version 2) | SAP Help Portal

并注意以下内容：

> 如果编辑了任何只读属性，则会将其忽略，系统将继续处理可编辑属性。

> ValidityStartDate 被视为关键日期。如果提供 ChangeNumber 值，则将考虑此更改编号的关键日期。如果未提供 ValidityStartDate 和 ChangeNumber 值，则将系统日期视为关键日期。

> 如果使用更改编号更改生产工艺路线组的任何实体，则必须在请求有效负载中提供 ChangeNumber 属性。

> 如果 工厂 没有输入，则考虑相关联生产工艺路线抬头中的工厂详细信息。

> 只能使用关联的父实体（本例中为生产工艺路线顺序）创建工序。

此外，请确保工作中心已成功维护在正确的工厂组织架构下，并提供了正确的workcenter internal ID. 查询workcenter internal id 可以通过CDS view：I_Workcenter 获取，或者是查询Display workcenter 获取admin.data. 

如果有疑问，欢迎反馈。

谢谢。

entry.title: Re: No Changes Allowed ; product Still exist
entry.content:

We are also facing the same issue and no workaround from SAP except following the recommendations from the note 1605397.

Did you find any solution for this issue?

BR,

What is the difference between logic and physical informationobject for SRM? Can everyone explain it to me? In details? Thank you very much 🙂 for your support.

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Hey there @sudarshan_b @M-K @sandeepGottipati I'm curious, not using an alias in a count() scenario should work fine, regardless of runtime context (e.g. BTP/CF), esp. in the simple context of the northbreeze repo. Can you please share more info - it's hard to tell without any detail. Perhaps you could share the project code in a gist or repo, or just show the .js implementation file here?

entry.title: Re: Request for Cloud Readiness Check for SAP CDC
entry.content:
Readiness Check for SAP Customer Data Cloud is not supported.
Please refer the following kba to see which scenario is supported.
3404904 - Getting Started on SAP Readiness Check

entry.title: Re: Unsubscription Failed of Integration Suite in trial a...
entry.content: Same issue I am also facing for integration suite.

entry.title: Solution Options for Supply Network Planning
entry.content:
Summary

This article describes main options of an SAP application landscape that can provide order Supply Network Planning​ capability. A list of questions is intended to help evaluating the options and to make the right choice for a customer, taking their core processes and business requirements into account.

Business Requirements

Supply Network Planning is a process around Distribution Requirement Planning, Deployment, Demand and Supply Matching and Optimization. It aims to plan purchasing, manufacturing, distribution, and transportation through the supply chain network so that comprehensive tactical and operational planning and sourcing decisions can be simulated and implemented on the basis of a single, global consistent model.

Effective Supply Network Planning enhances demand forecasting accuracy, optimizes inventory and production capacities, and ensures efficient supplier collaboration. By integrating Advanced Planning systems with operational ERP (like ECC or SAP S/4HANA) and leveraging analytics. Companies can minimize costs, improve service levels, and ensure timely order fulfillment. These capabilities enable businesses to maintain optimal inventory levels, streamline operations, and enhance overall supply chain resilience, driving better customer satisfaction and competitive advantage.

According to SAP Reference Business Architecture the Supply Network Planning comprises the  following capabilities (Figure 1 - available to view in SAP Signavio Process Explorer):

 

Figure 1: Business Capability - Supply Network Planning
 

Solution Options

Typical solution operations for Supply Network Planning are the following:

  • SAP Integrated Business Planning

- IBP for Sales and Operations(S&OP)

- IBP for Response and Supply (R&S)

  • SAP S/4HANA Production Planning

- Material Requirements Planning (MRP) /MRP Live

- Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling PP/DS in S/4HANA (ePP/DS)

- Embedded Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling - Production Planning Optimizer (ePP/DS PPO)

Figure 2: Solution options for supply network planning

 

Characterization of the Solution Options

SAP Integrated Business Planning:

SAP IBP offers advanced planning algorithms to plan and optimize the whole supply chain. It helps you to develop an initial feasible supply plan and provide for breaching supply-demand gaps. Supply plan will be generated in the most profitable way. It is a cloud-based solution which offers flexibility, scalability, and ease of integration with other cloud applications.

The supply network planning is one of the key function in IBP for Sales and Operations Planning (S&OP) and IBP for Response & Supply (R&S) module. Normally we will separate the planning in SAP IBP as Time-series planning and Order-Based planning. 

Figure 3: Supply network planning in SAP IBP

IBP for Sales and Operations (S&OP): Support strategic and tactical management decision processes.

IBP for S&OP offers SNP capabilities based on time series planning and will introduce a new planning process on top of demand forecast. The outcome of the classical S&OP Planning process is a "Constrained Demand Plan".

The key capabilities of S&OP are:

  • Perform multi-level supply planning with Heuristic (finite and infinite) and Optimizer (cost-driven optimization).
  • Develop an unconstrained \ constrained mid to long term supply plan
  • Manage risks, assumptions and opportunities in supply network
  • Create the optimal business plan to drive revenue growth and increase market share

For more information about IBP for S&OP, please refer to:

Solution Summary Digital Supply Chain - Sales and Operations Planning

Drive Value into Your S&OP/ IBP Process

IBP for Response and Supply (R&S): Support operational supply planning

IBP for R&S (Order-based planning) aims to create a supply plan using operational data and react to short-term changes. This approach enables supply planning from an operational perspective: It uses detailed data from external systems, and takes into account, for example, planned orders, production orders, sales orders, and purchase orders. Compared to the Time series planning, the order-based approach takes a shorter-term view.

The key capabilities of R&S are:

  • Support of operational supply planning and response planning (orders)
  • Creates supply orders (planned orders, purchase req., stock transfer req.)
  • Generate allocations, can feed to live ATP process
  • Constrained priority rules-driven planning, optimization, and heuristics (roadmap)
  • Order data store with tight integration with ERP
  • Adjust \ create supply orders (planned orders, purchase req., stock transfer req.)
  • Re-Confirmation of sales orders
  • Deployment planning

For more information about IBP for R&S, please refer to:

IBP for Response and Supply

SAP IBP for Response and Supply Transportation Load Building

Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling PP/DS in S/4HANA (ePP/DS)

SAP S/4HANA ePP/DS allows the creation of feasible production plans and schedules that optimize scarce resources to stabilize production and help to make reliable commitments to your internal and external customers. It aims to optimize the production plan as part of the global plan and create feasible production schedules - ready for execution.

The key capabilities of ePP/DS are: 

  • Provide feasible and optimal production schedules
  • Consider the material and capacity constraints
  • Time-continuous scheduling (i.e. down to the second), supporting features like alternative resources, min/max constraints, dynamic setup times and costs
  • Multi-level pegging (i.e. material flow), connecting demand and supply elements
  • Alerting enabling exception-based planning
  • Advanced Planning & Scheduling Optimization Solvers and Heuristics

For more information about S/4HANA ePP/DS, please refer to:

Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling PP/DS in S/4HANA

Overview of the key functionality Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling in embedded PP/DS on S/4HANA.

ePP/DS Production Planning Optimizer (ePP/DS PPO)

The Embedded Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS) Production Planning Optimizer in SAP S/4HANA is a powerful tool designed to enhance production planning and scheduling processes. It integrates seamlessly with the core ERP functions, providing advanced capabilities for optimizing production plans and schedules. By leveraging advanced optimization algorithms, and interactive planning tools. 

PPO complements the existing planning process in PP/DS by providing the following capabilities: 

  • Ensure material flow end-to-end: from components to finished goods, across plants, MRP Areas and distribution centers. 
  • Consider capacity constraints and initial allocated capacities (on time-bucket level). 
  • Propose PP/DS orders in time buckets which could be defined on a sub-daily level. 
  • Create the orders in right lot sizes (across BOM levels), promoting a smoother transition from time-bucket-based planning to time-continuous scheduling. 
  • Consider penalties (safety stock, maximum stock), costs (procurement, production, storage) and constraints (production capacity and lot sizes). 

For more information, please refer to: Production Planning Optimization | SAP Help Portal

S/4HANA Material Requirements Planning (MRP) / MRR Live

Material Requirements Planning (MRP): The main function of material requirements planning is to guarantee material availability, that is, it is used to procure or produce the requirement quantities on time both for internal purposes and for sales and distribution. This process involves the monitoring of stocks and, in particular, the automatic creation of procurement proposals for purchasing and production.

MRP Live: Compared to classic MRP, MRP Live benefits from improved performance and execute the planning run in much frequency cycles. This means that we can execute daily providing the MRP controller with more benefits.

 

Criteria to determine the most suitable target solution

1. What is customer's planning strategy?

Make to stock (MTS) or Make to order (MTO)

Compare to MTO customers, MTS customer may require more advanced supply network planning and demand forecasting capabilities to avoid supply shortages. MTS strategies also needs to support a very close customer-vendor relationship to ensure timely provision of goods from stock.

You can find more information form: Strategies for Make-to-Stock Production | SAP Help Portal and Strategies for Make-to-Order (MTO) Production | SAP Help Portal

2. Does customer want to create a strategic sales plan?

IBP for S&OP is designed to support strategic and tactical management decision processes. In contrast, MRP and ePP/DS are primarily focused on the operational level.

3. Does customer need constrained multi-level supply network plan?

ePP/DS PPO integrates purchasing, manufacturing, and distribution so that comprehensive tactical planning and sourcing decisions can be simulated and implemented on the basis of a consistent model.

3. Does customer need detailed shop floor level plan?

ePP/DS offers capabilities for detailed scheduling and optimization in manufacturing processes, especially in complex and high-variability production environments. It is a plant-centric solution designed for industries with intricate manufacturing processes that require precise synchronization of production orders.

4. Does customer want to integrate SAP IBP and ePP/DS?

If yes, Synchronized Planning for Production (SYPP) enables tight integration between: 

1. SAP IBP Time-series-based supply planning and PP/DS on SAP S/4HANA 

2. SAP IBP Order-based planning and PP/DS on SAP S/4HANA 

The main capability is to synchronize your end to end business processes, plans and data, from planning to execution. It also enforces short-term decisions and changes to execution in real-time.

For more information about SYPP, please refer to: Synchronized Planning for Production

Decision Tree

You can find all the possible solution combination from the picture below, for a PDF-Version, please refer to: Decision Tree for Supply Network Planning

 

Figure 4: Decision Tree for Supply Network Planning

 

Conclusion

  • SAP IBP is considered as a powerful planning tool, offering advanced analytics and collaboration features at both strategic level and operational levels.   
  • S/4 MRP is mainly used for orders creation process at operational level, providing a straightforward planning process without constraints.
  • ePP/DS and ePP/DS PPO provide advanced planning and scheduling features for manufacturing process, considering the material and capacity constraints.

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST: change posting key for vendor position
entry.content: When posting a vendor line with BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST, the clearing account and posting key is derived automatically (PK 31). Is it possible to change / determine the PK and account as needed (I need PK 34 other payables)? What exactly affects the PK/account derivation?

entry.title: Integration suite is Unsubscription failed showing in trail account.
entry.content:
I have created a trial account and subscribed to the integration suite service. The Integration suite could be showing unsubscription failed. And not open.

Couldn't unsubscribe from Integration Suite. Please try again. If the problem persists, post a question in the SAP Community.

I tried it several times yesterday and today.

Is there any idea to resolve the problem.

entry.title: Re: How to perform field Validation in ABAP Restful Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Hi Abhishek,

nice blog on custom Validation.

Thanks and regards,

Harkesh Yadav

entry.title: Re: 生产订单取消和关闭的操作，是否可通过API处理
entry.content:
你好，

您可以使用以下功能:下达生产订单、下达工序、技术上完成并关闭生产订单、设置删除标志、删除标识或交货完成标识。您可以为已由外部制造执行系统 (MES) 下达的生产订单设置特定状态，并放弃分配到外部 MES 的生产订单. 

Close order： Close Production Order | SAP Help Portal

Discard order： Discard Production Order | SAP Help Portal

您也可以在单个处理或批量处理中设置生产订单的状态。对于单个处理，您将在下级主题中找到详细信息。通过批量处理，如果为每个生产订单使用自己的更改集，则可以在一个请求有效负载中设置多个生产订单的状态。

具体信息以及示例参照：Set Statuses | SAP Help Portal

谢谢。

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST: tax position missing
entry.content:
The tax item does not appear in posted document, although the tables accounttax and relevant currencyamount are filled out with ITEMNO_ACC = 3. What could be the problem?

Lines 1 and 2 are vendor and GL items.

entry.title: Re: Handling ZIP files in SAP Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content:

I have a scenario in SAP CPI to send a .7z file (password protected) to cpi flow through postman and I want to unzip the .7z file using groovy script.

Kindly help me.

Thanks 

Mehran kha

entry.title: Re: Become an SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Integration Suite: New Certification out no
entry.content: What are some good sources to study for this cert? Does anybody know?

entry.title: start routine with Contains
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help me, how to write the Start Routine using with Contains for below scenario.

 

i am getting the data from source value KSFG000275C45000 if its contains 0275 it should be add the source field bukers = 0275.

Please provide me the code.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed b...
entry.content:
You need to allow client IPs to access your HANA Cloud instance. Please check whether you specified trusted source IPs matching your client IP. By default, only BTP IPs are trusted: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-connections?locale=en-US
In SAP HANA Cloud Central open the context menue (3 dots) on the right and chose "Manage Instance". Search for the section where you can enter the IPs and add your client IP.

entry.title: Re: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content:
I finally found the problem: the customer has set the Soft State to "Active" which is not supported by our OData service.

The Soft State can be set via transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

More information about Soft State:

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/25/a27ab5fb614b538bc44228fcc9b027/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01-Mass Retirement / Mass Transfer of fixed a...
entry.content: Hello Mark

entry.title: Re: How to see which function module is responsible for filling the outbound idoc during BCM?
entry.content:
Hello...

So, we were able to find the FM responsible for filling the outbound IDOC. It was FI_EDI_REMADV_PEXR2001_OUT. We found it in the payment run program in the F110 screen. But since it was a BCM process that is done in batches, we weren't able to debug by simply placing breakpoints. We had to place an infinite loop in a custom enhancement we happened to find and debug from there...

Regards,
Sharon

entry.title: Re: Delta configurationfor Standard API in S/4 HANA cloud
entry.content: yeah sure my mistake thanks for the response

entry.title: Re: Kyma Integration with SAP Cloud Logging. Part 1: Introduction and shipping Logs
entry.content:
Hi @anshika14 ,
Could you please confirm if the SAP Cloud Logging instance and binding are generated?
If yes, you should be able to access the secret from Kyma Dashboard, which contains the information to access the SAP Cloud Logging dashboard? 

Is this error coming when you try to access the dashboard url?

Thanks, 
Gaurav Abbi

entry.title: Re: Central Invoice Management - Request for information...
entry.content: We went over the user replication steps again, and noticed a typo... 🤓 Thanks for your reply!

entry.title: How the bank statement clear automatically ZP bank GL open item based on DMEE reference number
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have one query relating bank statement, we have query in the below process

Step 1: There is an open invoice KR
Step 2: We made a automatic payment and it cleared above open invoice also created DMEE with reference number and simultaniously there is an open item as ZP document which is bank GL account.
Step 3: To clear this we receive a incoming bank statement which contains information of reference number based on this number it clear the ZP bank GL open item automatically.

In this process we have query how this bank statement clears ZP bank GL open item only based on reference number where there is no connection between them. That reference number is not available in ZP open line item it is available only DMEE file (Outgoing file)

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: We required Query Report from SAP b1 Inventory Opening Balance, Stock IN Out & Closing
entry.content:
Dear All,

We required Query Report from SAP b1 Inventory Opening Balance, Stock IN Out & Closing in below format

 

Sr.NoInventory GL-CodeItem Group Name Item codeItem DescriptionUOMPriceWarehouse CodeOpening BalanceOpening Total ValueIncoming(GRN,Goods Receipt Incoming Total ValueOutgoing, Goods Issue,ConsumptionClosing  BalanceClosing Total Value
1123456Raw Material2233556644XXXXNos7XXX1007001510515100700

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

Thanks for this wonderful opportunity.
I have completed the certification course "Upgrading your SAP BW skills to SAP BW/4HANA" and I have sent an email to you. 

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.
Thanks,
Shreya Agrawal

entry.title: Re: Kyma Integration with SAP Cloud Logging. Part 1: Introduction and shipping Logs
entry.content:
Hi @Gaurav

Yes the instances and bindings are generated and I could also see the secret in my kyma namespaces.

The only difference is we have created the cloud logging instance and binding through BTP dashboard instead of using yamls.

We have manually created the secret in the KYMA namespaces using the values generated in the bindings

And as per the documentation , I can see data in the discover section . Only dashboard section is throwing that error 

Thanks & Regards,

Anshika

entry.title: Error message regarding user options for cross company postings
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
my customer got an error Message when trying to post tax payable for 2 differnet company codes.

In German the error message is like this: "Bukrs-übergr. Buchung in Benutezroptionen deaktiviert; Aktivieren".

We didn't find any option or user setting where we can activate or deactivate cross compayn postings.

Could anyone in the group help me with this topic?

bests,
Volker

entry.title: Re: MRP run should be allowed only if sales order costing is completed for MTO scenario (Public Clou
entry.content: Hello, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon. Kind regards, Jessica

entry.title: Customize GST report in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

This question is regarding the GST annexure reports available in SAP business one. I need guidance regarding adding of Document desires name and some other fields into the GST reports. how to get those fields added in the report. any guidance will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Webhook message Queue length and limitation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are having upgrade at APIM system, Which takes 2 hours of downtime for all APIM services.

Currently we have Webhooks that hits those endpoints for most of the data update activities. If we turn off the notification endpoint, webhook will retry to hit it for every 5 minutes for 3 hours as mentioned in document Here

Now we are trying to understand if there is any limitation on this message queue in terms of size, number of requests, processing request.
Is there any way to retrieve the message queue details and store to re-run the webhook triggers ? 
Is it possible to change the buffer time from 3 hours to custom value like 5 hours ?

Thanks

Rohit

entry.title: vulnerability is a buffer overflow issue in the Print ActiveX Control,
entry.content:
We are currently using Crystal Reports 2008 version 12.3.0.601 and is no longer in active development.

This version contains the below risks

CVE-2010-2567: This vulnerability is a buffer overflow issue in the Print ActiveX Control, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted input.

CVE-2010-2590: This vulnerability is related to improper input validation in the Print ActiveX Control, also allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.

We need to know from SAP and check if these vulnerabilities have actually been addressed (I doubt)

entry.title: Re: Porting Apps to SAP BTP
entry.content: Parallel processing requires breaking the monolith into micro services, then the choice between cloud foundry or K8S in BTP is up to your preferences, skills and  project.

entry.title: Re: Alternate Resource not appearing in PP/DS PDS in APO
entry.content:
Hi,

there are two ways:

1. Using the BADI in order to transfer the alternative seq. as in standard they are not transferred
2. using classification in order to get the different modes into the PDS.

ad 1. note 507025 - Examples for customer enhancements II
ad 2. note 2469590 Alternative resources from work center classification not updated in the PDS in APO (Product Data Structure)

entry.title: SAC write back to SAP datasphere
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can I add to a story based on datasphere a capability of correcting data and sending back to the source via datasphere?
If not, how can I create an exception report to locate my issues?

Thank you
Deb

entry.title: SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service - Authorization API: Role Collections all subaccount
entry.content:
Good morning,

We have a requirement to list the role collections of our subaccounts and their assigned IAS groups.

I am looking into the Authorization API:

https://api.sap.com/api/AuthorizationAPI/overview

This works fine. I create an XSUAA instance in a subaccount with plan api-access and I can get the role collections without any problem. The challenge comes when we want to achieve that for several subaccounts. Does this mean that we neeed to create an XSUAA instance in each subaccount and that we would need to call N times the API, each for each subaccount? Is it possible at all to achieve that at account level preventing us to create as many XSUAA instances as subaccounts?

Many thanks!

C.

entry.title: Re: How to extract business configuration data from SAP B...
entry.content: @kostadin_terziev  There is no option or provision to extract Business Configuration object data in SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: Re: error in cl_sxml_string_writer, sXML Library
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Yes, this is an workaround, but we are interested in getting an solution. The debugger cannot display XML that does not contain a declaration, even though the declaration is optional. Is it better to open a call to solve the program error?

entry.title: Re: delivery indicator for completed Purchase Orders
entry.content: Hello Eric, Thank you for the update as there are previous year PO, as they are not aware of whether they recived or not now they would like to close the descripancy how can we proceed to do so clearing all the open items whether to accept the items manually or cancel the po

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: Hi @MohammedMubeen - welcome to SAP Community! Newcomers cannot publish a blog post immediately, since there is a wait time. Thank you for completing the tutorial, and we look forward to reading your future blog posts.

Could you please help .

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP EBS Currency translation - FF.5

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
entry.content: @erickgrilo thank you for the question and apologies for the tardy response (vacation). I have forwarded your question to our experts and will let you know as soon as I have an answer. Best wishes!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：EPPM话题
entry.content:
本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，EPPM板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容：

  1. 管理项目需求-预留物料
  2. 使用API复制创建项目

1.管理项目需求-预留物料

业务需求

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

系统案例

APP：管理项目需求（Manage Project Demand）,对物料TG12创建项目预留10件，需求类型：项目库存，预留，保存后产生预留编号。

APP：管理项目需求可以监控刚刚创建的项目预留凭证122763，观察请求与发货数量等详细信息

当创建完预留后，观察此时物料TG12的库存情况，在仓库101A中总预留12件（其中2件非项目库存预留），项目库存10件

对预留凭证122763进行项目发货，移动类型221，发货7件

注意：此时必须有项目库存才能发货。

此时再观察物料TG12的项目库存与预留情况变化如下：

通过APP：管理项目需求，观察到预留请求与发货数量的变化。

2.使用API复制创建项目

功能介绍

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

 

感谢观看

Steve

entry.title: CDS for Sales Order Header and Item Text
entry.content:
Can Sales Order Header and Item Text be extracted using CDS view, which can further be consumed using BODS. 

( Note- As Virtual elements are ODATA dependent hence not supported during BODS extraction. )

entry.title: Re: Higher Education & Research in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear Rob,

Greetings.

Thanks for sharing, such a wonderful blog to go-thru. Very informative. Its good news for people involved in SAP IS-HER. Nice to know so much work going on related to Higher Education & Research. Generative AI Assistance 'Joule' will be really helpful to everyone. So do SAP IS-HER/Public Sector modules will be completely on cloud or some part in On-Premise(SAP GUI/ ECC) to support some activities. As we see SAP HCM now on cloud as SAP SuccessFactors.

Thanks & Regards,

Syed Jalees ur Rahman

entry.title: Re: Multiple BP Bank account - SEPA Direct Debit.
entry.content:
Hi, actually there is a solution, where you can associate each and every sales order or SD contract with a specific customer SEPA mandate. The SEPA mandate is then again associated with the specific customer account in question.

I do not remember the details, but you might have a switch on a specific business function to have this functionality available.

Could you advise what i did wrong?

Thanks

Siew

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@dr_eyer 
Welcome to SAP Community Paul! It's great to have your experience here.
I'm also sure you will meet many like minded SAP enthusiasts here!
If you meet some also from Berlin - we recommend to start small with an informal SAP Community event, like a meetup. You can take a look at existing location groups, and also upcoming events.
At a future point, you might also be interested in learning how to become an event organizer in Berlin!

@lauraschmitz @christoph_christophersen

entry.title: Re: how to repeat table in adobe form's masterpage?
Digital Signature for standard fiori application
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am extending a app from fiori app library and wanted to add a digital signature there in the object page section. After going through the help documentation Digital Signature Help Document , the configurations are not clear. Can anyone help on this topic about configurations and consuming the digital signature.

Thanks & Regards.
Arijeet

entry.title: SAP Event Broker for SAP Cloud Applications
entry.content:
1) Once I add a consumer to an existing formation, is there any way for this consumer to know about the events that have been sent by the producer it has subscribed to, previously. If yes, then how? If no, why?

2) Also is there a way for the producer to know which consumers have subscribed to which events of it? Maybe an API or some other technical way? One way is to simply find out from the subaccount where the formation is created, but is there any other better way?

3) Explain this scenario:
Producer: DPP team
Consumer: Firstly, the order management consumes events from DPP, then the T1, T2 tenants of Amazon consume events from order management.

Where and how will the formations be created? Explain how this scenario will work out.

Please respond to the above 3 questions or provide a documentation or link where I can find answers to these questions.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content:
Hi @KatherineKenneally

Thanks for the response. Could you please let me know how much is the wait time to publish a blog post

entry.title: Re: One chart of depreciation
entry.content: Yes it is possible.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows 2.1 Compati...
entry.content:
At this point, the Metadata for windows 2.1.1 is based on the based on SSAM 2305 feature set.(so designed to work with a #SAP Service and Asset Manager 2305 backend configuration).
See also: https://me.sap.com/notes/3410896
Note that the metadata for SSAM on Windows is currently different from the metadata for IOS & Android so a separate app configuration in BTPms is strongly recommended.
D.

entry.title: Re: DVM Self Service ST release for ERP legacy system
entry.content: Hi David, thank you for your answer. Can you also confirm if DVM was previously requested from SAP to see what SAP tables are of high volume, and now it is pushing to self-service run via Solman?

entry.title: Re: SAC write back to SAP datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @Deb_D 

I think the second half of this Blog describes what you are looking for:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/extending-sac-planning-acessing-planning-data-with-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13569660

BR, Martin

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 当中供应链管理和质量管理版块发布的新增功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容： 

  • 供应链管理：库存管理、库存盘点、订单承诺
  • 质量管理：FMEA、缺陷管理、质量通知

此外，有关仓库管理和运输管理相关内容请查看对应专题博客。

 

 供应链管理 

 （亮点1：）库存管理 – 管理库存盘点应用

在2408版本中，管理库存盘点应用盘点计数现已支持下载-上载选项，即为盘点计数下载/上载excel，更方便的对盘点计数进行结果录入，且下载的excel会基于盘点凭证中的条目和物料进行对应显示。如使用第三方仓库的客户可以轻松地为其仓库工作人员提供打印输出，完成纸质库存盘点流程后，可将结果以 Excel 文件形式上载回系统，面对盘点计数数据量大的情况可以更方便快捷的进行系统操作。同时在临时盘点流程中现可以通过增加一行的方式输入需盘点的物料而没有弹出消息，简化流程的同时并提高用户友好度。

 （亮点2：）库存管理 – 库存盘点容差

管理库存盘点差异的容差设置现已增强为：定义允许用户在库存盘点中过账的最大值差异，创建多个容差组并分配给用户，由于用户是在生产机中的数据，因此此配置可在生产机中使用SSCUI: 使用SSCUI： 106788Manage Tolerances for Physical Inventory Differences完成配置。配置完容差之后在对盘点差异进行过账则会相应提醒超过容差设置的报错，从而避免错误过账。

 （亮点3：）库存管理 – 库存类型

2408库存管理板块的库存转储应用现支持多种库存类型以及不同的特殊库存类型，详见下方图表，蓝色部分是2408版本库存管理应用新增支持的库存类型和特殊库存类型。

以管理库存应用举例，您可先在Stock-Multiple Materials库存查询应用中查到物料的库存情况，然后去到Mange Stock管理库存应用，并直接在应用中对特殊库存类型销售订单库存E stock进行转储操作。此步骤也可在工厂中的库存转储应用和跨工厂库存转储应用中操作。

 （亮点4：）订单承诺

2408增强了使用高级 ATP 的动态第三方订单处理的功能，具体为触发第三方订单处理 (TPOP)，其中销售订单中订购货物的需求传递到供应商，以直接装运至最终客户或供应商向内部工厂交货，然后公司通过高级可承诺量 (aATP) 将货物交付给最终客户。同时现在支持混合场景，首先通过 ATP 基本功能（产品可用性检查 (PAC) 和产品分配 (PAL)）检查内部工厂的可用性，然后针对通过供应商交货的剩余数量触发 TPOP，从而将确定的数据传输到销售凭证，自动触发供应商的采购申请 (PR)。

订单承诺板块已发布的CDS视图：销售和分销 (VBBE) 中单个未清需求的已发布 CDS 视图 API：I_SDScheduleLineWthOpenRqmtQty，借助已发布的 CDS 视图，您可以将计划解决方案集成到 SAP S/4HANA Pblic Cloud 。

 

质量管理

（亮点5：）高级变式配置和质量管理的集成

在2408版本中，高级变式配置（advanced variant configuration）现已和质量管理板块有集成了，可以按配置激活质量检验。具体为质量检验中的高级变式配置 (AVC) 与检验批次的集成，可将销售订单或采购订单配置中指定的特征传输到检验批次的检验特征，通过简化流程，提高使用 AVC 和质量管理的客户的整体效率。

（亮点6：）失效模式与影响分析（管理FMEAs）

现在在失效模式与影响分析-管理FMEAs应用中增强了打印的功能，先可将FMEA下载为PDF文件，通过对FMEA的打印，跟踪不同版本的FMEA。

 （亮点7：）缺陷管理

在2408版本质检模块中，现已启用缺陷的输出管理，并支持所有缺陷类别的打印，在处理缺陷Process Defects应用中通过打印功能传递缺陷，简化流程，并提高透明度。您可以点击打印，查看打印日志的记录，并打印PDF版本的缺陷文件。

 （亮点8：）质量任务通知

在当前2408版本中，现可以在workflow中启用质量任务的通知功能，如登录user：BPC_EXPERT在app：Manage Workflows for Task Processing in QM中配置处理质量通知任务的工作流，使得在质量通知和缺陷中创建的质量任务可以显示在我的收件箱应用中从而通知相关用户关于质量任务中需要的后续操作。

 

以上SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2408版本中供应链管理和质量管理的亮点更新内容，更多更新请查阅What's New in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.

 

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition: 

  • 自己写的blog 123 查看 
  • 引导解决决策树关键字及对应链接汇总 查看  
  • 引导解决决策树关键字汇总 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2308 亮点前瞻 查看  
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2302 亮点前瞻 查看  
  • 【GLOBAL BLOG LINKS】  

【等待GLOBAL更新这一段】 Feel free to ask your questions on SAP Community here. 关注 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 标签， PSCC_Enablement 标签，和PSCC_CCC_CN 标签来第一时间了解我们的最新博客。

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Pass!

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2407
entry.content:
We're excited to share the latest news around SAP Asset Performance Management. This blog provides videos on our latest updates, for example, enhancements to the "copy tool" for strategy assessments for classes, providing increased traceability to the original assessment and recommendations, and an easier technical object assignment process in risk and criticality assessments, which is great when handling extensive technical object lists. Both improvements are geared to streamline user experience.

 

Asset Reliability Engineering

Display of Source Assessment and Recommendation when Copying Strategy Assessments for Classes

Our recently enhanced copy assessment feature now enables users to easily trace back to the original strategy assessment that was the basis for the copy. The related recommendations of the source assessment are also included in the copy. This enhancement bolsters user understanding and offers clear links back to original data, thereby enhancing decision-making processes, underpinning accountability, and simplifying overall strategy assessment management. Watch the video to see how it's done: 

 

 

Asset Risk Assessment

Optimization of Technical Object Assignment in Risk & Criticality Assessments

We have improved the assignment process for risk and criticality assessments by introducing a function that filters out technical objects (TOs) already assigned to other ongoing assessments. This enhancement addresses the challenge users faced when selecting large numbers of TOs, especially in risk and criticality assessments where handling extensive lists is common and tedious.

Previously, if any selected TOs were already part of another assessment, the entire selection would be rejected, requiring users to identify and remove conflicting TOs individually. Now, when users attempt to assign TOs, the system validates the selection. If some TOs cannot be assigned due to being already assigned elsewhere, the system notifies the user and presents the option to proceed with assigning only the eligible TOs. This approach streamlines the assignment process and improves usability significantly. Watch the demo to see how it works:

 

 

Keep in touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Register right now for our upcoming webcast Supercharge Your Condition-Based Maintenance with IoT and AI using SAP Asset Performance Management on July 24 (10am EDT, 4pm CET) 
  • Check out all past and present Intelligent Asset Management webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. 
  • Check some of our recent blogs:
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2406 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2405 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
    • SAP Asset Performance Management Embedding Cumulocity IoT to Drive Innovations in IoT and AI
    • How AI-based Anomaly Detection empowers reliability engineers in SAP Asset Performance Management
    • SAP Asset Performance Management – FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis)
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2408 release update!

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
When I learned the word "forte" for expertise, not the musical phrase, it was pronounced with the 'e' silent. That was a few decades ago. Now I rarely hear that. 

https://www.dictionary.com/browse/forte

Can't argue with your dislike of a dictionary. I found the capture of language to be accurate, given in practice kudo is now a word.

Motto: https://www.goodreads.com/quotes/550389-when-i-use-a-word-it-means-just-what-i

entry.title: [P00] NFS Service について
entry.content:
先日、本番稼働中のシステムにおいて、NFSマウントしているディレクトリが消失したたため、
ジョブが実行できないという障害が発生しました。
原因については、HEC様のオペレーションミスとの報告がありました。
現時点では障害は復旧しておりますが、今後の対応として、NFSサービスの稼働監視とディレクトリ監視を実施していきたいと
検討しております。

システムは、APサーバが2台構成となっております。
SAP ABAPシステム用の標準SAP ディレクトリ構成として、/sapmnt, /usr/sap/trans のディレクトリに関しては、
AP1号機側からのNFSマウントにて、共有されているとの理解です。
この場合、AP1号機は、NFSサーバとなり、AP2号機は、NFSクライアントとなる理解です。
NFSを利用する場合において、NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)、NFSクライン後側(AP2号機)、それぞれで、稼働が必要なサービスについて
ご教授お願いします。NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)とNFSクライン後側(AP2号機)では、必要なサービスはそれぞれ異なるという理解です。
稼働が必要なサービスを特定し、そのサービスに異常が発生した時に監視できることを考えております。

NFSについては、バージョン3 が利用されているとの理解しております。
バージョン４とバージョン３にて、利用されるサービスが異なる場合については、それぞれで必要となるサービスについて教えて下さい。
NFSサービスを利用するにあたり、必要なサービスについて説明等されている文章やナレッジがありましたら、案内いただけますと助かります。


宜しくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [P00] NFS Service について
entry.content:
NFSサーバ（AP1号機）とNFSクライアント（AP2号機）で必要なサービスは異なります。以下に、それぞれの役割と必要なサービスについて説明します。

NFSサーバ（AP1号機）で必要なサービス:

  1. nfs-server: NFSサーバを提供するサービスです。これにより、指定されたディレクトリをネットワーク上で共有できます。
  2. rpcbind: NFSv3では、RPC（Remote Procedure Call）を使用して通信を行います。rpcbindは、RPCサービスのアドレスとプログラム番号をマッピングする役割を持ちます。
  3. rpc.statd: NFSのロック管理（ファイルロックなど）を行うためのサービスです。
  4. rpc.mountd: クライアントからのマウントリクエストを処理するサービスです。

NFSクライアント（AP2号機）で必要なサービス:

  1. nfs-client: NFSクライアント機能を提供するサービスです。これにより、サーバ上の共有ディレクトリをマウントできます。
  2. rpc.statd: NFSクライアント側でも、ファイルロックに関するサービスが必要です。

NFSv4での追加の考慮点:

NFSv4では、rpcbind、rpc.statd、rpc.mountdなどの追加のデーモンが不要になる場合があります。NFSv4は、単一のポート（通常は2049）を使用し、セキュリティ強化（Kerberos認証など）が組み込まれています。

監視について:

NFSサービスの監視には、以下のような方法が考えられます。

  1. プロセス監視: 上記で挙げたサービスのプロセスが稼働しているかを確認します。
  2. ポート監視: NFSが使用するポート（NFSv3の場合は111（rpcbind）、2049（nfsd）など）が開いているかを確認します。
  3. マウント監視: クライアント側で、マウントされたディレクトリが正常にアクセス可能かを確認します。
  4. ログ監視: NFS関連のログを監視し、エラーや異常を検出します。

監視ツールとしては、Nagios、Zabbix、Prometheusなどが一般的に使用されます。これらのツールを使用して、上記の監視項目を自動化し、異常が発生した際にアラートを発するように設定することができます。

entry.title: Sap Customer checkout Installation not recognized from CCOM
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Hope all are keeping well as usual ...!

Recently we have started creating a test environment for one of our customer users after implementing Branch in SAP Business One (10 2111) So to give fresh Sap Customer Checkout manager and monitor we had deleted existing data bases and recreate them accordingly . Now SAP customer checkout manager working fine for the test data base . So with in the same server we have installed CCO (HPOS is the name) V2.0 FP17 PL05 and it had recognized in the Customer checkout manager and allowed us to assign license . But when we installed another CCO with in one of branches (PAN1 is the name) this instance is not showing in Sap Customer checkout manager to assign licenses even though connection get successful . When going to fetch a public key from the integration tab an error message comes saying  "Customer Checkout Manager Not reachable" but connection successful . Even several restart been done but still not showing .

So could anyone please advise on this to get rid of this at our earliest because customer is waiting to go live soon when testing over .

Thanks in advance .  

SAP Customer Checkout SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: [CPI-Groovy]: Compare Integer and remove XML node
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your response. I am not sure why slurper didn't work but parser worked. If you can explain, it will be really helpful 🙂

entry.title: Re: Where can I maintain SAP Material Group?
entry.content: I found it in CBC, it will edit in Q system firstly and then need to transfer to P system.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently having the same issue, I tried to join the beginners community group but was met with an error "You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action" May I ask you how did you solve this issue?

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge: Demystifying the Remote Conversion
entry.content:
Hi Prem,

Yes, you can create InfoObjects, ADSOs, and CompositeProviders in BW bridge. See SAP Help for more details, for example: Creating DataStore Objects 

Note the restrictions in BW bridge, see SAP Note 3117800.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content:
Hi Sergiuy

Could you tell me what parameters the NC-CODE was configured?

Here is mine:

Status : Enabled ; Assign NC to Component : Stay; Nc catégoy : Défault; DPMO Category : None; NC Data Type : None; Collect Required NC Data on NC : Close; Message type : Empty; NC priority : 500; Maximum NC Limit (SFC) : 0; Severity of nonconformance: medium; Can Be Primary code : checked; Close Required : checked. Everything else is configured to  unchecked.

Thanking you in advance

Regards

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@peterczo You can make SAP S/4HANA events available to 3rd party brokers using different channels. A direct exposure of SAP standard events is not possible. You would have to take one step in between, as you had already assumed.

So, either Advanced Event Mesh or SAP Integration Suite would be needed and should support your required connectivity out of the box. SAP Event Mesh you could probably make work as well, I would not recommend it due to the smaller throughput and the fact that you would have to take care of the connectivity to your broker technology.

So, either Integration Suite or AEM would be your recommended path.

Best,

Karsten

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Proudly Nigerian

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Just new here and hoping to learn one or two things from this big community

entry.title: Re: How to check automatic exchange rate difference posting in SAP Business One
entry.content: Thank you for this blog. We are looking for a way to run the Exchange Rate Difference action for multiple SAP B1 companies/entities in the same time, since we have many entities. I cannot find the object in the API/Service Layer exposed. Is there any way to run the action globally for multiple SAP entities in the same time?

entry.title: Understand CSRF handling in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
What is CSRF?

CSRF stands for Cross-Site Request Forgery. It is a type of malicious attack that tricks the victim into submitting a malicious request. It uses the identity and privileges of the victim to perform an undesired function on their behalf. For instance, this could involve changing an email address or password, or making a purchase. The attack can cause damage even if the exploited action is normally harmless because it's performed without the user's consent or knowledge.

What is the defense mechanism?

CSRF token is a security measure used in web applications to protect against CSRF attacks.

It is a unique, random value associated with a user's session and is typically embedded within a form or URL to ensure that the user is intentionally submitting the request. This token is checked by the server to verify the source of the request, preventing malicious parties from tricking a user's browser into making a request on their behalf.

This is usually taken care of by the browser from where the app is launched and accesses APIs.

CSRF tokens are mainly used for communication with the server. Before an app is allowed to execute a modify operation through an HTTP request such as POST, PUT, DELETE etc., a CSRF token is generated by the server to ensure the security of the operation.

Here is a brief process of how it is used:

  1. First, the app sends a GET request to fetch a CSRF token from the server.
  2. During the GET request, the server generates a new CSRF token and sends it back in the response headers (usually under "x-csrf-token").
  3. The app then uses this token in the header of every modification request.
  4. The server validates the CSRF token in every modifying request. If it's valid, the operation proceeds.
  5. If it's not valid or missing, the server returns a 403 (Forbidden) status, and the operation does not proceed.

In this way, the CSRF token ensures that every operation modifying data is secure, authenticated, and originated from a trusted source. It protects against CSRF attacks where an attacker might trick a victim into executing actions of the attacker's choosing.

Why do we need additional CSRF handling for SAP Build Apps?

To ensure application security, it is essential to understand and manage CSRF token use effectively, as it is crucial in preventing unwanted actions from being performed.

In SAP Build Apps because of the current architecture, extra CSRF token handling is required sometimes for end-user deployed apps with a back-end connection accessing an API indirectly (via a destination such as S/4 HANA) wherein the request to the API goes through via managed app-router.

To be more precise, all installed destinations are CSRF protected by managed app-router, by default. However, if a backend behind a destination has its own CSRF protection, you need to tell SAP Build Apps to switch off managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

This is because when your app is fetching the CSRF token, it will end up getting the CSRF token from managed app-router and then it will send it to backend and fail because the backend doesn’t recognize that token.

What is the consequence of not handling the CSRF in SAP Build Apps?

In this case the symptom would be that the deployed build apps fail with a 403 (forbidden) error as illustrated in one example below.

Disclaimer: As of today it is not possible to show this failure early in the Preview mode as the request handling here (and in the design time) is done via destination-proxy. So in general, no additional CSRF handling is required for design-time and preview mode.

How to overcome this issue?

To overcome this issue, we need to extend your destination (only for some backends which has it's own CSRF protection (such as S/4 Hana backends)) with the tag below to tell the Build Apps to switch off the managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

 

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf = true

 

This way, when your app is fetching the CSRF token, managed app-router won’t interfere and you will get the CSRF token from backend and then when you send it to backend it will work (because the backend will recognize that token).

NOTE: If the SAP Build apps is already built and deployed then we need to also rebuild and redeploy the application for this change in the destination to take effect.

Additional Reading

Refer to the SAP Systems | SAP Help Portal under the 'Adding Data Endpoints' section.

entry.title: Re: Good to Know: SAP Travel Management for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hi, are these S/4HANA Travel Apps 2022 working without using the Business User represented by a Business Partner? And if not, why not? How do i know, that a Fiori Apps needs the Business User model to run?

entry.title: Re: July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Interesting that none of the July answers I saw posted had code in text boxes; all I can see are screenshots. We should encourage the former, for readability where feasible.
